elate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29393,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1154},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1696433051,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7223547581270819588","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"现在是早上8点通宵看完，剧情衔接的合理，没有拖沓，作者在这过程中加入了自己的思路，不同的电影剧情串联在一起没有什么违和感，即便是秋生和旺财相见也没什么不合理的，毕竟世界那么大撞脸也不奇怪，也没那么多不合理的伏笔，而且石坚是穿越者也可以理解，毕竟后面主要剧情是现代，而石坚可以整合茅山，后面可以迁徙到现代，已目前来看前期主角带着九叔在僵尸世界招兵买马，然后在现代做大做强再创辉煌，没有什么阴谋诡计人心险恶，大家都是好朋友，开开心心大怪兽，我觉得可以给到8分以上。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681863345,"group_id":"7214722344818838585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"11111222222222222","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+27dcpYa5RWsMSlNhjAhAs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2ea05d1bc0eb5b53c64bab1b7a0e99ff","user_id":"439454380860535","user_name":"卯时晨雾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"439454380860535","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7214722344818838585","book_info":{"abstract":"（简介无力，看文吧。)系统开局就跑路，这本也是带九叔来回穿越，
开鬼火的九叔，你们hold不住！
陈墨：怎么我的心声九叔都知道？
九叔：这就是这兔崽子说的都市吗？
